message:
test(core): add unit tests for context helper types [bd-3vz4]

Add 28 new tests covering public types in context.rs that previously
lacked test coverage:

- ResourceContentItem: text/json/blob constructors and accessors
- ResourceReadResult: constructors, first_text/first_blob for
  empty/single/multiple items
- ToolContentItem: text constructor, Image/Audio/Resource variants
- ToolCallResult: success/text/error constructors, is_error flag
- ElicitationResponse: accept/decline/cancel constructors,
  get_string/get_bool/get_int accessors, type mismatch handling
- Capability checks: can_sample/elicit/read_resources/call_tools
  default to false; resource_read_depth and tool_call_depth default to 0

Core crate now has 137 passing unit tests (up from 109).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
